name: National Merit Scholarship
amount: $2,500 one-time (National Merit) or renewable corporate/college-sponsored awards vary

eligibility.other_requirements: Must take PSAT/NMSQT junior year and score above state Selection Index cutoff; qualify as Semifinalist then Finalist

stackable_notes: National Merit $2,500 award is stackable. However, many college-sponsored National Merit awards replace institutional merit aid dollar-for-dollar — verify with each college before assuming additive value.
notes: Entry point is junior-year PSAT/NMSQT; students cannot apply directly. Best for high scorers in states with lower Selection Index cutoffs (rural/less-populated states have lower thresholds). Biggest financial value often comes from college-sponsored National Merit awards at specific universities, not the $2,500 NMSC award itself — advise students to research which colleges offer large sponsored awards.
